The '''Model Edu A-34''' was a training facility, designed by [[Delvin Constructs/Legends|Delvin Constructs]] and used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to train new [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Officers]]. Imperial commanders could easily construct these facilities on a planet, enabling them to promote and train new officers anywhere in the galaxy before sending them off to Core World academies (such as those at [[Carida/Legends|Carida]] or [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]]) for more formalized training. Delvin Constructs designed this facility after one of the classroom buildings at the Imperial [[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy of Carida]].
